name: mtthorne-internal-ai-server
description: Stable internal AI sidecar v1.0.1 Railway port-safe patch for 4 primary AI systems plus 7 round-table lanes, using existing GitHub/Railway/Netlify/R2/OpenAI/Anthropic services with provider/cost gates, owner-approval locks, deployment profiles, queue/storage/R2 adapters, release gates, traces, memory layers, and bridge prep.
